name: Shepherd
description:
__Debut:__ Episode 199
__Occupations:__ Marine Commander; Major Inspector/Special Inspector

Shepherd, also known as Condoriano, is an anime-only character and a commander from the Marine Headquarters that comes to G-8 in order to inspect it.

Shepherd thinks himself to be superior over other Marines due to his high rank. He would often threaten others with decommissions and court martial unless they follow his orders to the letter, or if things are just not going his way.
